name: Untrusted Pointer Dereference
description: The product obtains a pointer value from untrusted input and dereferences it, enabling attackers to read or write arbitrary memory locations, potentially causing crashes, data disclosure, or code execution.
detection_pattern: INGRESS[user_input] flows through TRANSFORM[pointer_conversion] to create a pointer that is then dereferenced to access STORAGE[memory] without a CONTROL[validation] node verifying the pointer references valid, expected memory regions
